# Sirr

> Sirr is an AI Career Intelligence Platform for job seekers in Norway and internationally. It helps candidates find relevant roles, tailor CVs and cover letters, track applications, and plan long-term career growth. Sirr supports job capture workflows from Finn.no, LinkedIn, NAV, and company websites.

Sirr is not a traditional job board. It is an intelligent workspace for matching, application execution, and career planning.

## Primary pages

- [Home](https://sirr.no/): Product overview, value proposition, and conversion CTAs
- [Features](https://sirr.no/features): Job matching, application tracker, AI CV/cover letters, Chrome extension, career planning
- [Pricing](https://sirr.no/pricing): Free and Pro plans (NOK)
- [FAQ](https://sirr.no/faq): Product, Finn/LinkedIn/NAV support, privacy, plans
- [About](https://sirr.no/about): Mission and product vision
- [Contact](https://sirr.no/contact): Product, partnership, and support inquiries

## Product capabilities

- AI job match score and relevance insights
- Application tracker with stages, reminders, and follow-ups
- AI tailored CV and cover letter generation
- Chrome extension for one-click job capture (Pro)
- Career plan with salary forecast and skills roadmap

## Audience

- Ambitious candidates in Norway seeking structured job search
- Professionals applying via Finn.no, LinkedIn, NAV, and company career pages
- Users who want one workflow for discovery, applications, and growth

## Canonical domain

- Website: https://sirr.no
- Sitemap: https://sirr.no/sitemap.xml
- Extended context: https://sirr.no/llms-full.txt

## Language

- Primary: Norwegian (Bokmål)
- Secondary: English (in-app language toggle)
